name: HStudio ESP32-S3 Hermes Relay Firmware v1

hardware.board: ESP32-S3 with I2C OLED + I2S ES8311 audio

features: Provisioning success page with LAN IP redirect
Wi-Fi history scan before startup reconnect
LAN device tab with fixed-port UDP Hermes discovery
MCU login form for discovered endpoints
Socket.IO client connection to Hermes Web UI /global-agent
ESP32-S3 PSRAM support for larger audio buffers
OLED status UI and idle animation
